newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.thanks: Thank you. Our next letter will find you.

hero.subcopy: Made for a moment that becomes a memory.

intro.headline: Every veil is finished by a single pair of hands, from the first cut to the last knot.

craft.headline: Slow patience, hand by hand.
craft.body: Hand-set tulle, silk thread, the slow patience of an atelier that measures time in weddings, not in seasons.

collection.subheading: Discover veils created for every kind of bridal story.

heritage.headline: Damascus, since 1966.
heritage.body: Here, veils are not made in haste. Each one begins with an idea and is completed with patience and precision — until every piece carries a character of its own, a touch that resembles nothing else.

stats.headline: Crafted in Damascus. Worn by the World.
stats.para1: For over sixty years, the DABBAS atelier has worked in silence — needle by needle, veil by veil. What began in Damascus as a family devotion to bridal craft has dressed brides across the world, each one carrying a piece of our hands on the most important day of her life.
stats.para1Short: Founded in Damascus in 1966. Three generations of handmade bridal veils, now carried to the world.

NotFound.headline: This thread leads nowhere.
NotFound.body: The page you were looking for isn't here. Return to the atelier.

About.headline: Damascus, since 1966.
About.lead: At DABBAS, we believe a veil is not an accessory added at the end — it is the piece that completes the dress and tells its story.

firstCut.title: We Listen First
firstCut.body: Every bride has her own vision, and every dress has its own detail. We begin by listening — understanding what she imagines — then translate that vision into a design that fits her and reflects who she is.

familyHouse.title: A Design Made for You
familyHouse.body: We don't look for repetition — we look for singularity. Each veil is designed to harmonise with the dress, the fabric, and the details, so it looks as though it was always meant to be.

materials.title: Materials, Chosen Carefully
materials.body: We select the finest tulle, refined lace, pearls, and crystals with care — because the quality of the material is the foundation on which every piece is built.

signed.title: Care in Every Detail
signed.body: From the first cut to the last stitch, every veil passes through precise stages of making and review — until it leaves the atelier carrying the standard we put our name on.

Contact.headline: Come to the atelier.
Contact.lead: We work by appointment. The atelier sits quietly in Damascus — come for a measurement, or simply for tea.

form.headline: Request a fitting at the atelier.

placeholders.name: The name we should ask for
placeholders.message: Your wedding date, the veil you have in mind, or anything you'd like us to know.

success.headline: Thank you. The atelier will be in touch.
success.body: We answer every request by hand, usually within two days. We look forward to meeting you.

errors.contactRequired: Please leave us a way to reach you.
errors.tooLong: That's a little too long — please shorten it.
errors.unreachable: We couldn't save your request just now.

Contact.directBlurb: Prefer to speak now? The atelier answers WhatsApp and email through the working week.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.blurb: The fastest way to reach the atelier.
whatsapp.prefilledMessage: Hello DABBAS — I would like to book a fitting.

email.label: Email
email.blurb: Write to us about a fitting, a custom piece, or a question.

index.headline: Veils, by hand.
index.blurb: Six pieces. Each finished in the Damascus atelier by a single pair of hands.
index.empty: No veils in this category yet.

blurbs.signature: The house's defining work — the veils DABBAS is known by, each finished by a single pair of hands.
blurbs.romance: Delicate lace, freshwater pearls, soft tulle. Veils that whisper rather than announce.
blurbs.cathedral: Dramatic length, timeless presence. A veil that arrives a moment after the bride does.
blurbs.bespoke: Designed entirely around you — begun in conversation at the atelier, finished at the last knot. Made once, never repeated.

empties.bespoke: Bespoke pieces are made once, for one bride, and never kept in stock. Begin yours at the atelier.

detail.bookSubhead: Be measured at the atelier. Private fittings, by appointment.
detail.enquireSubhead: Message us directly on WhatsApp about this piece.
detail.enquireWaMessage: Hello, I'm interested in {name} — {url}. Could you tell me more?
